abort.cannot_identify: Unable to determine a unique ID for this device. Please check your device and network configuration.
abort.no_devices_found: No devices found on the network.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single configuration possible.

error.coap_still_failed: CoAP communication still failed. Please verify that the CoAP server is properly enabled on your device and that there are no network connectivity issues.

coap_enable.description:
Unable to communicate with the Tewke device **{name}** at {host} via CoAP. Please ensure the CoAP server is enabled on your device and try again.

To enable CoAP, open the Tewke app on your device and enable the Local API setting.
coap_enable.title: Enable CoAP server

confirm_control_types.description: Setting up Tewke device **{name}** at {host}. Choose the Home Assistant platform type for each scene: {scenes}.
confirm_control_types.title: Configure scene control types

placeholder.description: Your Tewke device **{name}** is ready to be added to Home Assistant. Click Submit to complete the setup.
placeholder.title: Final setup

user.description: Enter the connection details for your Tewke device.
user.title: Set up Tewke device
